visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a split-screen layout. On the left, a woman eats a long, white, translucent food item with chopsticks; on the right, the main creator in a grey sweater holds a ridged potato chip. (2) The scene transitions to the main creator sitting in an indoor bedroom setting with a white quilted headboard. She is laughing and looking off-camera to her right, wearing a grey long-sleeved top. (3) A close-up shot shows a plastic tray filled with raw, long, serpentine white beef spinal cord, still in its original packaging with a label. (4) The creator uses metal tongs to lift a long, stretchy piece of the raw spinal cord from the tray, holding it up for the camera to see its gelatinous texture. (5) She sits at a table with a white plate containing the raw marrow and a small bowl of yellow sauce. She dips a long piece of the marrow into the sauce and slurps it into her mouth. (6) The camera shows a plate with both raw marrow and a piece that has been grilled, appearing slightly yellowed and charred. She samples the cooked piece using the tongs. (7) The creator gestures with the tongs and gives a thumbs up, expressing her preference for the raw version over the cooked one in the same bedroom setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓國網紅吃的白條東西? [Variety]: 不是生牛肉! 是「生牛脊髓」. (2) [Subtitle]: 韓國網紅說很好吃. [Variety]: 實驗歐膩. (3) [Subtitle]: 爸爸在看. (4) [Subtitle]: 爸爸在看我就拍不下去了啦哈哈哈. [Variety]: (牛脊髓). (5) [Subtitle]: 但後來我問爸爸, 爸爸說他曾經有吃過這個. (6) [Subtitle]: 爸爸在哪裡吃過呢? [Logo]: 爸爸. (7) [Subtitle]: 在韓牛烤肉店吃過. (8) [Subtitle]: 媽啊啊啊啊. (9) [Subtitle]: 有點像蛇的感覺欸... 看起來怪怪的. (10) [Subtitle]: 切成像辣炒年糕那樣小小一塊. [Logo]: 爸爸. (11) [Subtitle]: (不想聽). (12) [Subtitle]: 我先生吃看看, 然後等一下要把這個煎一下. (13) [Subtitle]: 在韓國的話, 牛脊髓會沾芝麻油加鹽一起吃. (14) [Subtitle]: 比想像中還沒什麼內臟味, 完全不腥耶. (15) [Subtitle]: 變好吃的耶! (16) [Subtitle]: 比那個魚肝好吃很多!!! (17) [Subtitle]: 但其實沒什麼味道啦, 只有口感. (18) [Subtitle]: 所以一定要沾芝麻油加鹽一起吃. (19) [Subtitle]: 這個也烤好了! 顏色就不一樣是吧! 沾那個芝麻油. (20) [Subtitle]: 其實一樣都沒什麼味道, 就是冷的還有熱的. (21) [Variety]: 哇沙比 超多. (22) [Subtitle]: 我其實比較喜歡生的欸. (23) [Subtitle]: 烤過的牛脊髓放久了味道會有點奇妙. (24) [Subtitle]: 還是生的牛脊髓比較好吃! 大家想吃看看哪一種呢?

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the bedroom; 1 female seen in the reference split-screen clip.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a casual grey long-sleeved sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic bedroom setting with a white quilted headboard and patterned bedsheets/tablecloth.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a loud, crisp crunching sound of a potato chip being bitten. The female speaker begins talking in an energetic Mandarin tone. (2) High-pitched laughter follows as the female describes her reaction to a visual. A faint male voice with a deeper, resonant tone is heard speaking Korean in the background. (3) A distinct plastic crinkling and tapping sound occurs as she handles the food tray. She continues her narration with high vocal arousal and varying pitch. (4) Wet, slurping sounds and rhythmic chewing noises dominate as the speaker consumes the marrow. These ASMR-style sounds are clear and central to the mix. (5) A short 'ding' sound effect and a comical cartoonish boing sound emphasize her surprise at the texture. (6) More chewing sounds are heard, accompanied by descriptive speech about the difference between 'cold' and 'hot' marrow. (7) The video ends with a bright, summarizing statement from the female speaker with a rising intonation, followed by a hard cut to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Background -> Demonstration -> Taste Test -> Comparison -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves to review and document the experience of eating raw beef spinal cord, a trending food item in Korea. It provides both the sensory experience (ASMR) and the creator's personal verdict on the taste and texture compared to the cooked version.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of on-screen text and fast-paced editing to maintain engagement. The contrast between the visceral ASMR eating sounds and the lighthearted domestic setting creates a relatable vlog atmosphere.
